data.title: BTFS Protocol v4.1 Beta released by BitTorrent Inc. with major upgrades in storage integration and network access.
data.description: BitTorrent Inc. has released the BTFS Protocol version 4.1 Beta which brings notable improvements such as enhanced storage integration and better network accessibility, as reported in a recent Medium post. The update aims to provide users with a more streamlined experience and improved functionality. This latest version introduces significant enhancements to the protocol, making it more efficient and user-friendly. Users can expect smoother storage integration and easier access to networks with this latest update.

data.title: Mesoblast confirms its cell therapy products are U.S. made, not subject to tariffs; leader in allogeneic cellular medicines.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Mesoblast Limited, a global leader in allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory diseases, reaffirmed that its allogeneic cell therapy products, listed on Nasdaq as MESO and ASX as MSB, are crafted from U.S. donors within the U.S. This classification as U.S. origin products exempts them from tariffs that may be imposed on imported branded or patented pharmaceutical items.

data.title: Perpetual DEXs hit all-time high $70B daily volume, up 15%, led by Aster in market dominance.
data.description: On Thursday, cryptocurrency Perpetual decentralized exchanges (DEXs) achieved a groundbreaking milestone with a record-breaking $70 billion in daily trading volume. This represents a remarkable 15% increase in trading activity compared to previous days.

data.title: Bitcoin miner TeraWulf intends to secure $3B for a data center with Google's support, shifting focus to AI. Morgan Stanley to aid in funding.
data.description: Mining firm TeraWulf is said to be seeking $3 billion in funding through Morgan Stanley, with Google providing support. The company is shifting its focus towards artificial intelligence.

data.title: Cipher Mining Inc. (CIFR) stock rose 5.2% to $12.24 in after-hours trading following $3.8 billion transactions and $800 million notes offering.
data.description: Cipher Mining Inc. (CIFR) stock is currently making waves, with prices reaching $12.24 in after-hours trading on Thursday, a 5.2% increase following a 17.72% gain in the regular session. The company recently disclosed two significant transactions with a combined potential value exceeding $3.8 billion. Closing at $11.64 on Thursday, CIFR also revealed plans for an $800 million private offering of 0.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Initial buyers have the option to acquire an additional $120 million within 13 days, potentially raising the total amount to $920 million. This move aligns with Cipher's capital strategy as it aims to utilize the funds for...

data.title: SUNMI becomes Google Android Enterprise Gold Partner, sets global benchmark for smart commercial devices.
data.description: Sunmi, a leading provider of smart commercial devices, achieved a significant feat in Singapore on September 26, 2025. The company proudly announced its recognition by Google as the first enterprise-focused provider to be designated as a Google Android Enterprise Gold Partner. This recognition marks a dual milestone for Sunmi and solidifies its position as a global leader in the industry.

data.title: Actor Hwang Jung-eum given 2-year suspended sentence for embezzling $3M from her agency for crypto investment.
data.description: The actress was handed a suspended two-year sentence for stealing millions from her agency to put into cryptocurrency investments.

data.title: ACL Digital buys Symbiance, a US CRO, enhancing Clinical research capabilities with AI, expanding services globally.
data.description: ACL Digital has recently acquired Symbiance to enhance its presence in the Clinical research industry. This acquisition bolsters ACL Digital's offerings in AI-driven clinical research, Contract Research Organization (CRO) services, and pharmacovigilance solutions. The move signifies ACL Digital's dedication to advancing digital transformation for pharmaceutical, biotech, and medical device companies worldwide. This strategic development underscores ACL Digital's focus on expanding its capabilities and market share in the sector.
